zh.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine de Harrock於1346年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾。她和Thomas Walwyn至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1400年在英國英格蘭賀福爾卡芙特 安布享年54歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Harrock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Shorrock
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Shorrock Green in Blackburn (Lancashire). The placename appears to derive from an Old English personal name Scorra + Old English āc ‘oak’.

variants.name: Sharick
meanings: Variant of   Sherk  , a surname of Swiss German origin. Compare   Sherick  .

variants.name: Sherrick
meanings: Variant of   Sherk  , a surname of Swiss German origin. Compare   Sherick  .

en.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine de Harrock was born in 1346, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Thomas Walwyn. She died in 1400, in Croft Ambrey, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine de Harrock est née en 1346, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Thomas Walwyn. Elle est décédée en 1400, à Croft Ambrey, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine de Harrockは1346年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた。彼女はThomas Walwynとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1400年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアクロフト アンブリーで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine de Harrock(은)는 1346년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Thomas Walwyn(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 크로프트 아브리에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine de Harrock родилась в 1346 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Thomas Walwyn. Она умерла в 1400 г. в местности крофт эмбри, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.
